question.title: [SYNTHETIC FIXTURE] Which example option will the example committee choose at its July meeting?
question.description: Synthetic fixture question for offline tests. Shaped like a MiniBench multiple-choice question; never submitted anywhere.
question.resolution_criteria: Resolves to the option announced in the committee's official July statement.
question.fine_print: If the statement is delayed past 2026-07-20, resolves Other.
